calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Dismiss For Failure To Serve Wummons Within 3 Years Of Filing Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: INTERSPACE'S Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Serve Wummons Within 3 Years Of Filing Complaint is Off calendar. This motion is moot due to the dismissal of entire action filed October 24, 2012 and the denial of Plaintiff's motion to set aside the dismissal on June 28, 2013. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (501)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Dismiss For Failure To Serve Wummons Within 3 Years Of Filing Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Continued To Aug-12-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT INTERSPACE INCORPORATED'S Motion To Dismiss For Failure To Serve Summons Within 3 Years Of Filing Complaint is transferred to Department 501 to be heard on August 12, 2013, at 9:30 a.m. Department has been hearing matters in this case. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Re-Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Of Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Howard Olsen of Law Offices of Michael Heath (415)931-4207, for Hemlata G. Vyas moving party/ Rafael Gespr of Law Firm of Phillip s. Keith (415)433-1790, for Interspace Inc., A California Corporation the opposing party.

Having heard argument from the Plaintiff, the Court adopts the Tantative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's Re-Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Of Complaint is DENIED. No proof of service on file and motion was filed untimely per CCP 473(b). Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

Re- Notice Ntc Of Mtn To Set Aside Dismissal Of Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF HEMLATA VYAS' motion To Set Aside Dismissal Of Complaint - This motion will be heard in Department 501 on June 28, 2013, at 9:30 am. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

Ntc Of Motin To Set Aside Dismissl Of Complaint
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Howard Olsen, Esq. of the Law Offices of Michael Heath, Tel. 415.931.4207, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF HEMLATA VYAS' Motion To Set Aside Dismissal Of Complaint is ordered off calendar without prejudice for failure to produce a proof of service. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185.

MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Michael Heath, Esq. for Plaintiff. Court orders case dismissed. This dismissal is pursuant to C.C.P. 583.250 for failure to comply with C.C.P. 583.210. Proceedings not reported. (610)
